reasoning: The informal statement asks to prove that an isometry f on a compact metric space X is bijective and a homeomorphism. The Lean statement asserts Continuous f ∧ Bijective f ∧ IsOpenMap f. A homeomorphism is precisely a continuous bijection whose inverse is continuous, which (given bijectivity and continuity) is equivalent to being an open map. So the conjunction "Continuous ∧ Bijective ∧ IsOpenMap" is logically equivalent to "bijective and a homeomorphism." The hypotheses (metric space, compactness, isometry) match the informal ones exactly. Therefore the Lean signature faithfully captures the informal claim.
